signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL is still one of the cleaner shorts because price is down while open interest is still slightly rising, which suggests fresh shorts are still pressing.
HEMI remains the clearest fade because funding is still heavily positive while price is weak, which leaves the long side crowded and vulnerable.
GRIFFAIN is already well into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
LIT is still a modest short lean because the tape remains weak and fresh shorts are still pressing rather than a clean reversal forming.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
DASH is already in a hard liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
PENDLE is weak, but not in a way that creates a clean enough new entry versus just waiting for a bounce.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
MERL is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh position.
